requests.prompt: Full-scene, edge-to-edge studio start frame (no inner frame, border, inset, pasted image, black margins, or central vertical rectangle). Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock; preserve Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat shape, oatmeal beige color, silk‑cotton sheen, double-breasted front, belt, epaulettes, labels, and any visible marks. Place the product at plausible scale on a wooden hanger centered on a simple chrome garment rack. Background: minimal warm grey‑beige cyclorama with a clean seamless backdrop and matte concrete floor, filling all canvas edges. Lighting: soft neutral fill plus a controllable spotlight that, in this start frame, is faint, forming a subtle circle on the floor under the rack and positioned slightly forward for a long shadow. No hand or person. No additional props, graphics, mirrors, text, logos, watermarks, or posters. Not a product-only packshot.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
